demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse; usually independent

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't passed any urine since yesterday morning, my legs feel like heavy water balloons, and I am too exhausted to get out of bed. My wife is worried because I keep drifting off and getting a bit muddled.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting worse over the last day or so and now I'm a bit short of breath and can't seem to pee at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about a day and a half ago, a couple of days after a really bad tummy bug
symptom_narrative.character: hardly any urine, then almost none since yesterday morning; legs and ankles have swelled up and feel heavy and tight; feeling wiped out, sick in the stomach, off my food, and a bit foggy in the head
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: worst I've felt in a long time, can't get out of bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: swelling in both legs up to the calves; the tiredness and muddled feeling all over
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and steadily worsening since it began
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own; feels more breathless when I try to lie back
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: nausea, no appetite, feeling lightheaded when I stand, a bit short of breath, and my wife says I'm confused at times
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before; my kidneys have always been fine as far as I know
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound right now; normally I look after myself completely

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, on a tablet for it
past_medical_history.how_managed: takes a blood pressure tablet every day

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recent bad gastro / tummy bug with vomiting and diarrhoea and barely able to drink
back pain over the last week or two

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a blood pressure tablet (perindopril, I think)
ibuprofen (Nurofen) for my back — I've been taking quite a lot of it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who is present and increasingly worried by how drowsy and muddled he has become

objective_data_offered.value: both lower legs look very swollen and puffy up to the calves, skin looks tight and shiny
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described/shown over video by the patient and spouse, not examined or measured

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he is drowsy, keeps drifting off, is muddled when he talks, and is too weak to get out of bed
spouse says he has passed almost no urine since yesterday morning despite trying
spouse reports several empty and part-used ibuprofen blister packs on the bedside table from the past week
